title: Metrics Query API — GET /v2/metrics
content:
Retrieve time-series metric data for monitored resources.

**Endpoint:** GET https://api.clouddash.io/v2/metrics

**Request Parameters:**
| Parameter      | Type     | Required | Description                                    |
|----------------|----------|----------|------------------------------------------------|
| resource_id    | string   | Yes      | CloudDash resource ID (e.g., aws-ec2-i-abc123) |
| metric_name    | string   | Yes      | Metric name (e.g., CPUUtilization)             |
| start_time     | ISO 8601 | Yes      | Start of time range (UTC)                      |
| end_time       | ISO 8601 | Yes      | End of time range (UTC)                        |
| resolution     | string   | No       | '1m', '5m', '1h', '1d' (default: '5m')        |
| aggregation    | string   | No       | 'avg', 'max', 'min', 'sum', 'p99' (default: 'avg') |

**Example Request:**
```bash
curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer cd_live_xxx' \
  'https://api.clouddash.io/v2/metrics?resource_id=aws-ec2-i-0abc123&metric_name=CPUUtilization&start_time=2024-01-01T00:00:00Z&end_time=2024-01-01T01:00:00Z'
```

**Response (200 OK):**
```json
{
  "resource_id": "aws-ec2-i-0abc123",
  "metric_name": "CPUUtilization",
  "unit": "Percent",
  "datapoints": [
    {"timestamp": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", "value": 42.3},
    {"timestamp": "2024-01-01T00:05:00Z", "value": 38.1}
  ]
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid parameters (check start_time < end_time, valid metric_name).
- 404: Resource not found or not monitored by this account.
- 429: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the number of seconds in Retry-After header.
